question: How many books do not have reviews?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE Book_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Book_ID FROM review);

back_translation.intent: 统计未被评论的书籍数量
filters: Book_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Book_ID FROM review)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问未被评论的书籍数量，SQL反向翻译描述通过Book_ID NOT IN子查询正确表达了这一逻辑，且COUNT聚合函数和空的group_by、order_by、limit字段与问题要求一致。
